title: WR-90 empty matched waveguide
description: Create, validate, run, and inspect the uniform-Yee single-mode TE10 WR-90 two-port workflow.

ui_journey.acceptance: Create a new immutable WR-90 experiment revision from the golden input.
Change guide length or measurement band through typed fields and show a semantic diff.
Show guide aperture, TE10 port planes, directions, and reference planes without a solve.
Show cutoff, next-mode, CPML-clearance, and support-lane diagnostics.
Approve and launch a CPU worker linked to the immutable revision.
Show the two-port S-matrix, S11/S21 metrics, validation state, and TE10 field availability.
Export a checksum-verified bundle containing spec, code, events, metrics, and limitations.

limitations: P0 supports the uniform Cartesian, single-mode rectangular TE10 lane only.
The headline broad gate is magnitude-based; phase evidence has a separate approximately convention-free witness.
Multimode, compact junction, and nonuniform waveguide variants remain outside the P0 golden workflow.
